SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BERENSTEIN, SIDNEY SUBSTITUTED FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT AS ATTORNEY FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-29-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-04-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON OCT-04-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

VINCENT KIRCHER SIDNEY BERENSTEIN, ESQ. VS. JOSEPH WARREN IN PRO PER 10:50 A.M. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF TO HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT JOSEPH WARREN FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 1272 MARKET STREET APT #403 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. AND FOR MONEY DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $560.00 TO BE PAID IN INSTALLMENTS AS FOLLOWS: $245.00 BY 4:00 P.M. 10/4/93, $80.00 BY 10/11/93 AT 4:00 P.M. AND $395.00 TO BE PAID BY 10/14/93 AT 4:00 P.M. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CASHIER'S CHECK, CASH, OR MONEY ORDER TO THE HOTEL MANAGER, CARSON BRADFIELD. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH, STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION CONDITIONAL UPON TIMELY PAYMENTS AS STATED ABOVE. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR ITS OWN COST AND ATTORNEY FEES. ACTION TO BE DISMISSED IF ALL CONDITIONS ARE MET. SEE REPORTER NOTES FOR FURTHER DETAILS REGARDING DEFENDANT'S PAYMENT RECEIPTS. REPORTER, DIANA PADILLA. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT. 11:10 A.M. COURT ADJOURNED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARREN, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1272 MARKET ST, #403, S.F. $560.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $560.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED PENDING DEFT PAY $245.00 BY OCT 4, 1993; $80.00 BY OCT 11, 1993; $395.00 BY OCT 14, 1993, ALL BY CASHIERS CHECK OR MONEY ORDER. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WARREN, JOSEPH
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WARREN, JOSEPH
